entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange operating under the Toobit brand through Cayman entity Hopeful Technology Co., Ltd. and affiliated Polish entity ELYNDRET sp. z o.o., with active spot, derivatives, copy-trading, earn, and related services.
entity.notes: The existing 2022 launch marker is retained because accessible first-party materials do not state a more precise launch date. The origin is broadened from Cayman Islands to Cayman Islands / Poland based on Toobit's legal statement describing the Cayman parent and Polish operating affiliate. U.S. MSB registration claims are not treated as prudential exchange licensing.

expected.summary: Cayman Islands-based centralized exchange launched in 2022 and still operating under the Toobit brand.

changes.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange operating under the Toobit brand through Cayman entity Hopeful Technology Co., Ltd. and affiliated Polish entity ELYNDRET sp. z o.o., with active spot, derivatives, copy-trading, earn, and related services.

evidence.title: Toobit Legal Statement
evidence.notes: The statement describes the relationship between ELYNDRET sp. z o.o. in Poland and Hopeful Technology Co., Ltd. in the Cayman Islands.

evidence.title: Toobit Terms of Use
evidence.notes: The terms identify Hopeful Technology Co., Ltd. as the company providing the electronic trading platform.

evidence.title: About the Toobit Exchange
evidence.notes: The official page verifies current exchange operation and product availability.
